creator: raimeetravel
caption:
Omg?? this was SO helpful, BUT I have thoughts!! 👇 

I feel like this method helped me plan actual outfits instead of just having random pieces that I don’t know how to style. I will 10000% be doing this from now on! 

I think it’s at the very least a great base. Everything fit perfectly in my carry-on and I even had extra space. ‼️ BUT!!! I do think I’d want more variety so I added extra tops that will also be able to mix and match with everything. 

Have you used this method? 

I’m heading on a 10-day trip around the U.S. west coast and then to Canada for my dream destination 👀!! I’ll let you know how long the outfits last & how this goes!

#sudokupacking #carryononly #traveltips #usatravel #packingtips

transcription.text: I'm trying the sudoku packing method for the first time and apparently this is a carry-on only packing method that helps you get 27 outfits out of just nine pieces Okay, so each row makes an outfit So does each column and then you can go further and do like this or like this Also this way works and this way I also stuck with a similar color palette to make this even easier This is probably the fastest I've ever put together my outfits for a trip. It took me less than 10 minutes I think everything is gonna go together really well I'm Remy and as always stay tuned for more smart travel tips like this safe travels. Bye
